name: Cash Time Loan Centers
description_short: Cash Time Loan Centers Tucson, Arizona — Arizona title loan lender offering Title Loans, Personal Loans, and Registration Loans with same-day funding an...
description_long:
Cash Time Loan Centers is an Arizona-based consumer lending company operating multiple retail locations across the Phoenix metro area. The company specializes in asset-backed short-term lending products, with a focus on serving borrowers who have poor credit, no credit history, or are actively rebuilding their credit profile. Their flagship Phoenix location at 2030 W. Baseline Rd. serves the South Mountain, Laveen, and surrounding communities.

Cash Time offers three core loan products: Title Loans (secured against vehicle title), Personal Loans, and Registration Loans, which are an Arizona-specific product secured by vehicle registration rather than title. They also offer Title Loan Buyouts, allowing borrowers to refinance existing high-interest title loans from other lenders into lower-rate loans with more manageable monthly payments. Applications can be submitted in person at a branch or entirely online, and many customers receive same-day funding either as a walk-out cash loan or via direct deposit to a bank account.

What sets Cash Time apart from generic title loan storefronts is their emphasis on flexible repayment terms, the buyout/refinance product targeting customers trapped in predatory loans elsewhere, and a 24/7 online portal for account management, payment scheduling, and balance tracking. They also market themselves as having no hidden fees and rates designed to fit the borrower's budget — though no specific APR figures are disclosed on the location page reviewed.

Honestly, Cash Time operates in the high-cost, short-term lending space. Title loans and registration loans are inherently expensive products that carry the risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed. They serve a genuine need for borrowers shut out of traditional credit, but prospective customers should compare APRs carefully before committing, and consider whether a credit union payday alternative loan (PAL) or CDFI product might offer lower total cost. The Title Loan Buyout is a potentially useful feature for those already locked into worse terms.
pros: Accepts borrowers with poor credit, no credit, or credit in rebuilding
Same-day funding available — walk out with cash or receive direct deposit
Title Loan Buyout program lets borrowers refinance out of higher-rate loans
Three distinct loan products (Title, Personal, Registration) for different situations
Fully online application and in-person options with no requirement to visit a branch
24/7 online portal for balance checks, payment scheduling, and account management
No hidden fees per their stated loan terms
cons: Title and registration loans carry vehicle repossession risk if payments are missed
No APR or rate ranges disclosed on the location page — borrowers must inquire directly
Closed Sundays; Saturday hours are short (10 AM–4 PM only)
Arizona-only footprint — not an option for borrowers outside the Phoenix metro area
Short-term collateral lending is inherently high-cost compared to credit union or CDFI alternatives
best_for: Phoenix-area residents who own a vehicle and need fast cash with poor or no credit
Borrowers already in a high-interest title loan who want to refinance at a lower rate
People who need same-day funding and cannot qualify for a traditional personal loan
Arizona residents seeking Registration Loans as an alternative to full title lending
diagnosis: Cash Time is a practical option for Phoenix-area borrowers with damaged or no credit who own a vehicle and need cash the same day — particularly useful for those wanting to escape an existing high-rate title loan via their buyout program. The main caveat is that title and registration loans are high-cost secured products with vehicle repossession risk, and Cash Time does not disclose rates publicly, so borrowers must compare terms in person before signing.
services: Registration Loans (Arizona-specific, secured by vehicle registration)
Title Loan Buyouts (refinancing competitor title loans)
Same-day direct deposit to bank account
In-person loan application at branch locations
